65628232.title: BBC Radio 2 Young Folk Award

pageprops.wikibase-shortdesc: Award for United Kingdom young folk musicians

65628232.description: Award for United Kingdom young folk musicians
65628232.extract: The BBC Radio 2 Young Folk Award is an annual competition for young folk musicians in the United Kingdom. It was first awarded in 1988 as the Young Tradition Award, taking its present name in 1998. Recent winners of the award include Maddie Morris Brighde Chaimbeul, Talisk and Greg Russell & Ciaran Algar.
